title: Fix verilator_gantt for hierarchically verilated models
body:
This PR fixes `verilator_gantt` for use with `--hierarchical` by:
1. Removing calls to execution profiler `configure` in hierarchical children. Configuration should be done only from the main module to avoid messing the call hierarchy.
2. Removing function tracing calls from hierarchical children to avoid time mismatches and make results comparable to non-hier runs.
